body: Suresh, your Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 is getting a lot of attention - 12400 views in the last 30 days! What's your plan to capitalize on this high volume and attract more corporate bulk orders?
rationale: The high_volume signal detected for Suresh's Mylari South Indian Cafe, combined with the actionable intent to plan for corporate bulk thali packages, drove this message to explore his strategy for leveraging the popular Weekday Lunch Thali offer.

body: Padma, aapke Zen Yoga Studio mein high retention dekhne ko mil raha hai, jismein First Month @ ₹499 offer ka bhi yogdan hai! Aapke kids yoga summer camp ke liye kya specific goals set karne chahiye?
rationale: High retention signal detected for Padma, leveraging specificity to prompt her to set specific goals for the kids yoga summer camp.

body: Hi Aditya, you have an appointment tomorrow at Karim's Salon. To ensure everything goes smoothly, please confirm your attendance. We've had 756 views and 2 calls in the last 30 days, and we're looking forward to serving you again.
rationale: The appointment reminder signal drove this message, using the personalized reminder lever with a confirmation CTA to increase the chances of Aditya showing up tomorrow.

body: Riya, kal Beauty Lounge by Renu mein aapka appointment hai - kya aap confirm kar sakti hain? 93 logon ne pichle 30 dinon mein humare salon ki direction li hai, aur humein ummeed hai aapka anubhav bhi achha hoga.
rationale: The appointment reminder signal drove this message, using the personalized reminder lever with a confirmation CTA to ensure the customer is prepared for their appointment tomorrow.

body: Ramesh, aapke Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy ke calls hamare peers se 18% zyada hain, khaskar Free Home Delivery > ₹499 offer ke saath. Aap summer season mein kis tarah se ORS, sunscreen, aur antifungal medicines ki demand ko capture karne ke liye apne shelf ko optimize karna chahte hain?
rationale: The above_peer_calls signal drove this message, using the specificity lever to highlight the successful offer and asking an open-ended question to gather information on how Ramesh wants to optimize his shelf for the summer season.

body: Meera, aapke dental clinic ke posts 22 din se stale hain. Aapke â‚¹299 ki Dental Cleaning offer ko promote karne ke liye kya strategy apnana chahiye?
rationale: The stale_posts signal drove this message, using the specificity lever to highlight the 22-day gap, and prompting Meera to think about a new strategy to promote her offer.

body: Namaste Mr. Sharma, aapki medicine ki recall date aa gayi hai. Aapki last visit 22 April 2026 ko thi. Free Home Delivery > ₹499 ki offer hai. Kya aap ab book a slot at Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy chahte hain?
rationale: The recall due signal drove this message, using the lever of personalized recall with specific date/slot/price, and the CTA is a binary yes/no to book a slot.

body: Vivaan, it's time for your recall visit at Bright Smile Dental, 30 days have passed since your last visit on 2026-04-01. Shall we book a slot for you now?
rationale: The recall due signal drove this message, using the lever of personalized recall with specific date, and the CTA is binary yes/no to book a slot.

body: Meera, Smile Studio just opened 1.3km away in Lajpat Nagar, offering Dental Cleaning at ₹199. With your retention at 38%, it's time to protect your turf. Will you run a loyalty-appreciation offer this month?
rationale: The new competitor opening in Lajpat Nagar drove this message, using the lever of loss aversion to prompt Meera to protect her market share with a loyalty-appreciation offer, hence the binary yes/no CTA.

body: Naye competitor ke karan, aapka retention 0% hai, Suresh. Aapke regular customers ko loyalty-appreciation offer dena zaruri hai. Kya aap is month mein yeh offer chalana chahte hain?
rationale: A new competitor opening in Indiranagar drove this message, using the lever of loss aversion to protect market share, and prompting a defensive loyalty-appreciation offer to lock in regulars, hence a binary yes/no CTA to Suresh.

body: Namaste Lakshmi, 7 din ho gaye, aapke salon mein kya chal raha hai? Last week aapke engagement bahut acche the, abhi kya service demand mein hai?
rationale: No Vera touch in 7 days and last signal was high engagement, so I'm doing a low-friction check-in with Lakshmi to ask what's been moving this week and offering to draft something from the answer.

body: Suresh, kya aapke restaurant mein is week kuch special ho raha hai? Main aapki growth dekh raha hoon, 12400 views aur 88 calls in last 30 days, aur CTR bhi 0.032 hai, jo peer se 28% zyada hai. Mujhe batayein, main aapke liye kuch draft kar sakta hoon.
rationale: No Vera touch in 7 days and high volume signal drove this message, using the lever of asking the merchant to share their current status and offering to draft something in 5 minutes, with an open-ended CTA to encourage a response.

body: Rashmi, we've missed you at PowerHouse Fitness! You were doing great with your weight loss goals, and we'd love to have you back. Try our 3 FREE Trial Classes to get back on track. Are you in?
rationale: The customer's 57-day lapse and previous weight loss focus drove this win-back message with a no-commitment trial offer, leveraging the merchant's existing '3 FREE Trial Classes' to re-engage Rashmi.

body: Reyansh, it's been a while since your last visit to Asha Dental Care. We've missed you and want to help you get back on track with your dental health. We're offering a free consultation to all our lapsed customers. Would you like to schedule one?
rationale: The customer's lapsed status and 0-day gap since the last visit drove this message, using a no-shame recall and specific past goal to prompt a no-commitment ask for a free consultation.

body: Reyansh, aapko 12 baar hamare paas aaye hain, lekin abhi thoda waqt ho gaya hai. Aapki health ko lekar hum chintit hain, kya aap ek free consultation lena chahte hain?
rationale: The customer has lapsed and the signal is a soft reminder to win them back, so I used a no-shame recall and a specific past goal to re-engage them with a no-commitment ask for a free consultation.

body: Anjali, aapke Glamour Lounge Spa & Salon ke paas 1200 views aaye hai, lekin sirf 8 calls aaye hai. Aapke lapsed customers ki sankhya 180 hai, kya aap unhe wapas lane ke liye koi offer ya service shuru karna chahti hain?
rationale: The winback_eligible signal and low CTR of 0.022 drove this message, using specificity as the lever to prompt Anjali to consider a clear action to win back lapsed customers, hence the open-ended CTA to gather her thoughts.

body: Anand, aapke Chai Point Cafe ke 2189 views aur 26 calls aaye hain, lekin CTR 0.025 hai. Aapke cafe ke liye kya specific offers ya discounts aap provide kar sakte hain?
rationale: The signal of 2189 views and 26 calls with a CTR of 0.025 drove this message, using the lever of specificity to ask Anand about specific offers or discounts to improve engagement.

body: Lakshmi, Diwali is coming soon! While most salons focus on Oct-Dec weddings, don't miss the mini-bridal window in April-May with 15% of annual bridal volume. Push your Haircut @ ₹99 as an event-day hook, 4980 views in the last 30 days show customers are looking for services like yours. Will you promote it now?
rationale: The upcoming festival signal drove this message, using the lever of urgency and counter-intuitive insight to suggest promoting the Haircut @ ₹99 offer, with a binary yes/no CTA to encourage Lakshmi to take action.

body: Pooja, festival season is here! While most Koramangala gyms overspend on ads now, smart gyms like Bend & Burn can gain an edge by pushing offers in the pre-holiday window, like October. Will you create a limited-time offer for the upcoming festival to attract new members?
rationale: The festival upcoming signal drove this message, using the lever of urgency and counter-intuitive insight to suggest a contrarian move, prompting Pooja to consider creating a limited-time offer.

body: Vikas, aapke Sunrise Medicos ke liye unverified GBP detected hai, jisse aapke business ko 0.3% ka estimated uplift mil sakta hai. Aapne abhi tak 720 views aur 14 calls paaye hain, lekin verification ke baad aapke results aur bhi behtar ho sakte hain. Aap GBP verification ke liye kya karenge?
rationale: The unverified_gbp signal drove this message, using the specificity lever to highlight the estimated uplift, and prompting the merchant to take action with an open-ended question.

body: Suresh, IPL match today, but did you know Saturday matches can decrease covers by 12%? Push your Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free offer on weeknights instead, like Tuesday to Thursday, to increase covers by 18%. Will you try this strategy?
rationale: The IPL match today signal drove this message, using the lever of counter-intuitive insight to suggest adjusting promo days, with a binary yes/no CTA to prompt Suresh to try this strategy.

body: Suresh, aapke Mylari South Indian Cafe ke views mein 5% ki vriddhi dekhi gayi hai! Ab retention ko 0% se badhane ke liye, kya aap ek naye offer ya post ke saath intent capture karne ka plan banate hain? 12400 views aur 88 calls ke saath, aapke paas momentum hai.
rationale: The 5% increase in views this week drove this message, using the lever of momentum to capture intent and convert the spike, with an open-ended CTA to encourage Suresh to plan his next move.

body: Mukesh, aapke Pizza Spot ke views mein 14% ki vriddhi dekhi gayi hai! Ab retention ko 0% se badhane ke liye koi specific offer ya post kaise capture karein?
rationale: The 14% increase in views this week drove this message, using the momentum lever to prompt Mukesh to capture intent with a specific offer or post, hence the open-ended CTA to explore options.

body: Bharat, aapke Bharat Dental Care ke liye last 30 days mein 980 views aaye, lekin sirf 4 calls hui. Aapka CTR 0.018 hai, jo peer median 0.030 se 40% kam hai. Kya aap is week ek targeted offer chalana chahte hain?
rationale: The low CTR signal drove this message, using the lever of loss aversion by showing the number of views and calls, and asking for a binary yes/no response to run a targeted offer this week to close the gap with peers.

body: Sushma, The Beauty Bar ke liye views mein 8% ki giraavat aayi hai. Aapke CTR ab -45% below peers hai, lekin ek targeted offer chalane se aap is gap ko kam kar sakte hain. Kya aap is week ek offer chalana chahti hain?
rationale: The lead signal of a 45% below peer CTR and an 8% drop in views this week drove this message, using the lever of loss aversion to prompt Sushma to take action and close the gap with a targeted offer.

body: Padma, your views are up 10% this week! What's the next offer or post to capture this momentum and lock in regulars at Zen Yoga Studio?
rationale: The +10% views spike drove this message, using the momentum lever to prompt Padma to capitalize on the current interest and convert it into regular customers.

body: Vikas, aapke Sunrise Medicos ke views mein 2% ki vriddhi dekhi gayi hai. Ab retention badhane ke liye kya kadam uthaaye jayein?

body: Priya, aapki dental cleaning ki recall date 12 November 2026 hai, aur humne aapke liye Wed 5 Nov, 6pm aur Thu 6 Nov, 5pm ke slots book kiye hain. Aapka dental cleaning sirf ₹299 mein ho sakta hai. Kya aap
rationale: The recall due signal drove this message, using the lever of personalized recall with specific date/slot/price, and the CTA is a multi-choice slot to book an appointment.

body: Diya, it's been 30 days since your last visit to Zen Yoga Studio! We've got a great offer for you - First Month @ ₹499. Are you ready to get back on track?

body: Meera, Dental Council of India ne 04 Nov 2026 ko circular jari kiya hai, jismein radiograph dose limits revise kiye gaye hain. Ab IOPA exposure ke liye maximum dose 1.0 mSv ho gayi hai. Aapke clinic ke liye yeh bahut mahatvapoorn hai, kyun ki aapke patient mix mein high-risk adults bhi hain. Aapki X-ray setup ko audit karne ke liye abhi 41 days bache hain.
rationale: The Dental Council of India's revised radiograph dose limits drove this message, using the lever of specificity and reciprocity to offer compliance support, prompting Meera to take action before the December 15 deadline with an open-ended question.
